title: Yuki's World
overview: Yuki, who was born in a world where sounds don't sound like anything, runs into the enigmatic Itsuomi and immediately takes an interest in him.

title: To Affection
overview: Yuki tries to come to terms with her newfound feelings for Itsuomi, while Oushi offers a glimpse into what he's been trying to come to terms with for a long time.

title: Someone Is Thinking of Someone
overview: Having come to terms with her feelings for Itsuomi, Yuki prepares to make her move, but she encounters a sight that throws her into confusion and doubt.

title: What Kind of Voice?
overview: Having made plans with Kyouya to go shopping, Rin invites Yuki and Itsuomi to join them.

title: The Answer
overview: Itsuomi and Yuki have a chat at his place, and several lingering questions are answered.

title: I Thought I Wanted to Keep Watching Her Forever
overview: Yuki and Kyouya each urge Itsuomi to make himself clear on where he stands in his relationship with Yuki, and he surprises them with his answer.

title: Let Me Introduce You to My Girlfriend
overview: Itsuomi is away on his trip, and Yuki is left trying to come to grips with their new reality.

title: One Small Step
overview: Being introduced to Yuki gets Shin reminiscing about his high school days with Itsuomi and Emma.

title: I Don't Want to Leave
overview: The gang heads up the mountains for a very eventful boot camp.

title: Oushi's World
overview: Itsuomi knows that a confrontation with Oushi is inevitable and decides to take matters into his own hands.

title: Promise
overview: Yuki faces her nerves before an interview for her part-time job, and Shin has to battle his to finally break the news to Emma.

title: Our World
overview: Yuki and Itsuomi have their first date as a couple, and it leads to them learning more about each other.
